prompt: An architectural section-map image for Ernst Junger's An der Zeitmauer. Show five connected spatial zones as one symbolic structure: a porch or threshold, a first hall of measured and fateful time, a central inhabited chamber of human divisions, an observatory-like upper region for sideral divisions, and a deep foundation or undercroft for primal ground and person. Philosophical architectural drawing, restrained palette, no title, no labels, no people, no decorative fantasy elements, one coherent image.
